message.content:
@startuml
title Deploy workload

actor User
database "tfexplorer" as tf
boundary node

User ->> tf : 1 send workloads definition\n
activate tf 
ref over tf #DDF0FF#**\n2 ensure enough capacity is available in the pool.\n3 decrease remaining pool capacity \n4 sends workloads definition **/  
deactivate tf 

alt [workload deployed sucesfully]    
    note right of user:6 user access its workload   
   activate node     
     node --> tf :5 result success      
      deactivate node       
else[failed to deploy workload or provision timeout reached]\note left of tf:#red7 cancel full reservation8 increase remaining pool capacity#/        
end


@enduml
